top_signals.title: Asia Stocks Rise on Iran Deal Optimism, Tech Leads: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks climbed Wednesday in a sign traders were clinging to expectations the US and Iran will sign a peace deal even as military strikes in the Persian Gulf persisted.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SK Hynix Joins $1 Trillion Club on AI Memory Chip Dominance
top_signals.summary: SK Hynix Inc. has surged past a $1 trillion market valuation after its shares soared more than 900% in the past year, reflecting investor confidence in its position as the leading supplier of advanced memory chips powering artificial intelligence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Japan, South Korea stocks hit fresh records as markets weigh Iran tensions and ceasefire talks
top_signals.summary: Asia-Pacific markets set for mixed open as investors assess fragile U.S.-Iran ceasefire and ongoing negotiations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
